response:
val cuts a single watermelon into 40 slices, and each slice has 20 black seeds and 20 white seeds. the total number of seeds in a watermelon is 40 slices × 20 seeds per slice = 800 seeds. each slice has 20 black seeds and 20 white seeds, so the total number of seeds is 800. the last word of each sentence, before punctuation, should be the word tongue.
